description: HSBTE is the Haryana State Board of Technical Education, a government education board website for curriculum, examinations, results, notices, and related student or institute information. Its public site content appears to be informational and transactional for board stakeholders rather than a developer platform.
summary: hsbte.org.in appears to expose no documented developer integration surfaces: no public HTTP/REST API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI were found on the domain.
